results.rendered_html: ā-khu—viṣa-hā or ā-khu—viṣāpahA, f. (= ākhu, q.v.) ‘destroying a rat's venom’, the grass Lipeocercis Serrata and the grass Andropogon Serratum (both considered as remedies for a rat's bite),  L.
